title: Add a more generic "prepend or append instructions" method
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Refactor our handling of `--env` and `--label` options so that it'll be easier to add more instructions at the beginning and end of stages.

#### How to verify it

This shouldn't break the current set of tests.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
